   339	      weatherInfo: WeatherInfo.fromJson(json),

   341	      updatedAt: TypeUtils.safeString(

     6	class WeatherDuringMatchSection extends StatelessWidget {
     7	  const WeatherDuringMatchSection({
     8	    super.key,
     9	    required this.session,
    10	    required this.l10n,
    11	  });
    12	
    13	  final GameSession session;
    14	  final AppLocalizations l10n;
    15	
    16	  @override
    17	  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    18	    final snapshots = _snapshots();
    19	    return Column(
    20	      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
    21	      children: [
    22	        const Text(
    23	          'Weather during match',
    24	          style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: Colors.orange),
    25	        ),
    26	        const SizedBox(height: 10),
    27	        _fishermanSummary(snapshots),
    28	        const SizedBox(height: 8),
    29	        if (snapshots.isEmpty)
    30	          Text(
    31	            'No weather data for this match',
    32	            style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey.shade600),
    33	          )
    34	        else ...[
    35	          if (snapshots.length > 1) _trend(snapshots),
    36	          const SizedBox(height: 8),
    37	          ...snapshots.map(_snapshotCard),
    38	        ],
    39	        const SizedBox(height: 24),
    40	      ],
    41	    );
    42	  }
    43	
    44	  List<WeatherSnapshot> _snapshots() {
    45	    if (session.weatherSnapshots.isNotEmpty) return session.weatherSnapshots;
    46	    final hasSessionWeather = session.weatherDescription.isNotEmpty ||
    47	        session.weatherTemperatureCelsius != null ||
    48	        session.weatherPressureHpa != null ||
    49	        session.weatherHumidityPercent != null ||
    50	        session.weatherWindSpeedMs != null;
    51	    if (!hasSessionWeather) return const [];
    52	    return [
    53	      WeatherSnapshot(
    54	        latitude: session.latitude ?? 0,
    55	        longitude: session.longitude ?? 0,
    56	        placeName: session.weatherPlace,
    57	        description: session.weatherDescription,
    58	        temperatureCelsius: session.weatherTemperatureCelsius,
    59	        feelsLikeCelsius: session.weatherFeelsLikeCelsius,
    60	        pressureHpa: session.weatherPressureHpa,
    61	        humidityPercent: session.weatherHumidityPercent,
    62	        windSpeedMs: session.weatherWindSpeedMs,
    63	        windDirectionDegrees: session.weatherWindDirectionDegrees,
    64	        fetchedAt: session.weatherFetchedAt,
    65	      ),
    66	    ];
    67	  }
    68	
    69	  Widget _fishermanSummary(List<WeatherSnapshot> snapshots) {
    70	    final events = session.grid.where((entry) => entry['type'] != 0).toList();
    71	    if (events.isEmpty) {
    72	      return const Text(
    73	        'No activity events recorded for match insight.',
    74	        style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12),
    75	      );
    76	    }
    77	    int interval(Map<String, dynamic> entry) =>
    78	        int.tryParse(entry['interval']?.toString() ?? '') ?? 0;
    79	    final active = [...events]..sort((a, b) => interval(a).compareTo(interval(b)));
    80	    final quiet = [...events]..sort((a, b) => interval(b).compareTo(interval(a)));
    81	    final best = active.first;
    82	    final slow = quiet.first;
    83	    final weather = snapshots.isEmpty ? '' : ' Weather samples available across the match.';
    84	    return Text(
    85	      'Match insight: highest activity near ${best['timestamp'] ?? '--:--'} after ${interval(best)}s. '
    86	      'Quietest gap before ${slow['timestamp'] ?? '--:--'} was ${interval(slow)}s.$weather',
    87	      style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12, height: 1.35),
    88	    );
    89	  }
    90	
    91	  Widget _trend(List<WeatherSnapshot> snapshots) {
    92	    final first = snapshots.first;
    93	    final last = snapshots.last;
    94	    final parts = <String>[];
    95	    final temp = _delta(first.temperatureCelsius, last.temperatureCelsius, 'temp');
    96	    if (temp.isNotEmpty) parts.add(temp);
    97	    final pressure = _delta(first.pressureHpa, last.pressureHpa, 'pressure');
    98	    if (pressure.isNotEmpty) parts.add(pressure);
    99	    final winds = snapshots
   100	        .map((s) => s.windSpeedMs)
   101	        .whereType<double>()
   102	        .toList();
   103	    if (winds.isNotEmpty) {
   104	      winds.sort();
   105	      parts.add('max wind ${winds.last.toStringAsFixed(1)} m/s');
   106	    }
   107	    if (parts.isEmpty) return const SizedBox.shrink();
   108	    return Text(
   109	      parts.join(' • '),
   110	      style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12),
   111	    );
   112	  }
   113	
   114	  String _delta(double? from, double? to, String label) {
   115	    if (from == null || to == null) return '';
   116	    final diff = to - from;
   117	    if (diff.abs() < 0.1) return '$label stable';
   118	    final arrow = diff > 0 ? 'up' : 'down';
   119	    return '$label $arrow ${diff.abs().toStringAsFixed(1)}';
   120	  }
   121	
   122	  Widget _snapshotCard(WeatherSnapshot snapshot) {
   123	    final rows = <String>[
   124	      if (snapshot.fetchedAt.isNotEmpty) snapshot.fetchedAt,
   125	      if (snapshot.description.isNotEmpty) snapshot.description,
   126	      if (snapshot.temperatureCelsius != null)
   127	        '${l10n.temperatureLabel}: ${snapshot.temperatureCelsius!.toStringAsFixed(1)}°C',
   128	      if (snapshot.pressureHpa != null)
   129	        '${l10n.pressureLabel}: ${snapshot.pressureHpa!.toStringAsFixed(0)} hPa',
   130	      if (snapshot.humidityPercent != null)
   131	        '${l10n.humidityLabel}: ${snapshot.humidityPercent!.toStringAsFixed(0)}%',
   132	      if (snapshot.windSpeedMs != null)
   133	        '${l10n.windSpeedLabel}: ${snapshot.windSpeedMs!.toStringAsFixed(1)} m/s',
   134	      if (snapshot.windDirectionDegrees != null)
   135	        '${l10n.windDirectionLabel}: ${snapshot.windDirectionDegrees!.toStringAsFixed(0)}°',
   136	    ];
   137	
   138	    return Container(
   139	      width: double.infinity,
   140	      margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
   141	      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
   142	      decoration: BoxDecoration(
   143	        color: Colors.white10,
   144	        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
   145	      ),
   146	      child: Text(
   147	        rows.join('\n'),
   148	        style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, height: 1.35),
   149	      ),
   150	    );
   151	  }
   152	}

   319	  factory GameSession.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) {
   320	    return GameSession._(

   329	      finalCount: json.containsKey('finalCount') ? TypeUtils.safeInt(json['finalCount']) : null,
   330	      matchDuration: TypeUtils.safeString(

   332	        defaultValue: '00:00:00',

   334	      grid: TypeUtils.safeMapList(json['grid']),

   338	      astronomyInfo: AstronomyInfo.fromJson(json),
   339	      weatherInfo: WeatherInfo.fromJson(json),
   340	      weatherSnapshots: _parseWeatherSnapshots(json['weatherSnapshots']),
   341	      updatedAt: TypeUtils.safeString(
   342	        json['updatedAt'],
   343	        defaultValue: TypeUtils.safeString(json['id']),

     6	class WeatherDuringMatchSection extends StatelessWidget {
     7	  const WeatherDuringMatchSection({
     8	    super.key,
     9	    required this.session,
    10	    required this.l10n,
    11	  });
    12	
    13	  final GameSession session;
    14	  final AppLocalizations l10n;
    15	
    16	  @override
    17	  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    18	    final snapshots = _snapshots();
    19	    return Column(
    20	      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
    21	      children: [
    22	        const Text(
    23	          'Weather during match',
    24	          style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: Colors.orange),
    25	        ),
    26	        const SizedBox(height: 10),
    27	        _fishermanSummary(snapshots),
    28	        const SizedBox(height: 8),
    29	        if (snapshots.isEmpty)
    30	          Text(
    31	            'No weather data for this match',
    32	            style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey.shade600),
    33	          )
    34	        else ...[
    35	          if (snapshots.length > 1) _trend(snapshots),
    36	          const SizedBox(height: 8),
    37	          ...snapshots.map(_snapshotCard),
    38	        ],
    39	        const SizedBox(height: 24),
    40	      ],
    41	    );
    42	  }
    43	
    44	  List<WeatherSnapshot> _snapshots() {
    45	    if (session.weatherSnapshots.isNotEmpty) return session.weatherSnapshots;
    46	    final hasSessionWeather = session.weatherDescription.isNotEmpty ||
    47	        session.weatherTemperatureCelsius != null ||
    48	        session.weatherPressureHpa != null ||
    49	        session.weatherHumidityPercent != null ||
    50	        session.weatherWindSpeedMs != null;
    51	    if (!hasSessionWeather) return const [];
    52	    return [
    53	      WeatherSnapshot(
    54	        latitude: session.latitude ?? 0,
    55	        longitude: session.longitude ?? 0,
    56	        placeName: session.weatherPlace,
    57	        description: session.weatherDescription,
    58	        temperatureCelsius: session.weatherTemperatureCelsius,
    59	        feelsLikeCelsius: session.weatherFeelsLikeCelsius,
    60	        pressureHpa: session.weatherPressureHpa,
    61	        humidityPercent: session.weatherHumidityPercent,
    62	        windSpeedMs: session.weatherWindSpeedMs,
    63	        windDirectionDegrees: session.weatherWindDirectionDegrees,
    64	        fetchedAt: session.weatherFetchedAt,
    65	      ),
    66	    ];
    67	  }
    68	
    69	  Widget _fishermanSummary(List<WeatherSnapshot> snapshots) {
    70	    final events = session.grid.where((entry) => entry['type'] != 0).toList();
    71	    if (events.isEmpty) {
    72	      return const Text(
    73	        'No activity events recorded for match insight.',
    74	        style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12),
    75	      );
    76	    }
    77	    int interval(Map<String, dynamic> entry) =>
    78	        int.tryParse(entry['interval']?.toString() ?? '') ?? 0;
    79	    final active = [...events]..sort((a, b) => interval(a).compareTo(interval(b)));
    80	    final quiet = [...events]..sort((a, b) => interval(b).compareTo(interval(a)));
    81	    final best = active.first;
    82	    final slow = quiet.first;
    83	    final weather = snapshots.isEmpty ? '' : ' Weather samples available across the match.';
    84	    return Text(
    85	      'Match insight: highest activity near ${best['timestamp'] ?? '--:--'} after ${interval(best)}s. '
    86	      'Quietest gap before ${slow['timestamp'] ?? '--:--'} was ${interval(slow)}s.$weather',
    87	      style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12, height: 1.35),
    88	    );
    89	  }
    90	
    91	  Widget _trend(List<WeatherSnapshot> snapshots) {
    92	    final first = snapshots.first;
    93	    final last = snapshots.last;
    94	    final parts = <String>[];
    95	    final temp = _delta(first.temperatureCelsius, last.temperatureCelsius, 'temp');
    96	    if (temp.isNotEmpty) parts.add(temp);
    97	    final pressure = _delta(first.pressureHpa, last.pressureHpa, 'pressure');
    98	    if (pressure.isNotEmpty) parts.add(pressure);
    99	    final winds = snapshots
   100	        .map((s) => s.windSpeedMs)
   101	        .whereType<double>()
   102	        .toList();
   103	    if (winds.isNotEmpty) {
   104	      winds.sort();
   105	      parts.add('max wind ${winds.last.toStringAsFixed(1)} m/s');
   106	    }
   107	    if (parts.isEmpty) return const SizedBox.shrink();
   108	    return Text(
   109	      parts.join(' • '),
   110	      style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12),
   111	    );
   112	  }
   113	
   114	  String _delta(double? from, double? to, String label) {
   115	    if (from == null || to == null) return '';
   116	    final diff = to - from;
   117	    if (diff.abs() < 0.1) return '$label stable';
   118	    final arrow = diff > 0 ? 'up' : 'down';
   119	    return '$label $arrow ${diff.abs().toStringAsFixed(1)}';
   120	  }
   121	
   122	  Widget _snapshotCard(WeatherSnapshot snapshot) {
   123	    final rows = <String>[
   124	      if (snapshot.fetchedAt.isNotEmpty) snapshot.fetchedAt,
   125	      if (snapshot.description.isNotEmpty) snapshot.description,
   126	      if (snapshot.temperatureCelsius != null)
   127	        '${l10n.temperatureLabel}: ${snapshot.temperatureCelsius!.toStringAsFixed(1)}°C',
   128	      if (snapshot.pressureHpa != null)
   129	        '${l10n.pressureLabel}: ${snapshot.pressureHpa!.toStringAsFixed(0)} hPa',
   130	      if (snapshot.humidityPercent != null)
   131	        '${l10n.humidityLabel}: ${snapshot.humidityPercent!.toStringAsFixed(0)}%',
   132	      if (snapshot.windSpeedMs != null)
   133	        '${l10n.windSpeedLabel}: ${snapshot.windSpeedMs!.toStringAsFixed(1)} m/s',
   134	      if (snapshot.windDirectionDegrees != null)
   135	        '${l10n.windDirectionLabel}: ${snapshot.windDirectionDegrees!.toStringAsFixed(0)}°',
   136	    ];
   137	
   138	    return Container(
   139	      width: double.infinity,
   140	      margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
   141	      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
   142	      decoration: BoxDecoration(
   143	        color: Colors.white10,
   144	        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
   145	      ),
   146	      child: Text(
   147	        rows.join('\n'),
   148	        style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, height: 1.35),
   149	      ),
   150	    );
   151	  }
   152	}

   338	      astronomyInfo: AstronomyInfo.fromJson(json),
   339	      weatherInfo: WeatherInfo.fromJson(json),
   340	      weatherSnapshots: _parseWeatherSnapshots(json['weatherSnapshots']),
   341	      updatedAt: TypeUtils.safeString(

     6	class WeatherDuringMatchSection extends StatelessWidget {
     7	  const WeatherDuringMatchSection({
     8	    super.key,
     9	    required this.session,
    10	    required this.l10n,

    12	
    13	  final GameSession session;
    14	  final AppLocalizations l10n;
    15	
    16	  @override
    17	  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    18	    final snapshots = _snapshots();
    19	    return Column(
    20	      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
    21	      children: [
    22	        const Text(
    23	          'Weather during match',
    24	          style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, color: Colors.orange),
    25	        ),
    26	        const SizedBox(height: 10),
    27	        _fishermanSummary(snapshots),
    28	        const SizedBox(height: 8),
    29	        if (snapshots.isEmpty)
    30	          Text(
    31	            'No weather data for this match',
    32	            style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey.shade600),
    33	          )
    34	        else ...[
    35	          if (snapshots.length > 1) _trend(snapshots),
    36	          const SizedBox(height: 8),
    37	          ...snapshots.map(_snapshotCard),
    38	        ],
    39	        const SizedBox(height: 24),
    40	      ],
    41	    );
    42	  }
    43	
    44	  List<WeatherSnapshot> _snapshots() {
    45	    if (session.weatherSnapshots.isNotEmpty) return session.weatherSnapshots;
    46	    final hasSessionWeather = session.weatherDescription.isNotEmpty ||
    47	        session.weatherTemperatureCelsius != null ||
    48	        session.weatherPressureHpa != null ||
    49	        session.weatherHumidityPercent != null ||
    50	        session.weatherWindSpeedMs != null;
    51	    if (!hasSessionWeather) return const [];
    52	    return [
    53	      WeatherSnapshot(
    54	        latitude: session.latitude ?? 0,
    55	        longitude: session.longitude ?? 0,
    56	        placeName: session.weatherPlace,
    57	        description: session.weatherDescription,
    58	        temperatureCelsius: session.weatherTemperatureCelsius,
    59	        feelsLikeCelsius: session.weatherFeelsLikeCelsius,
    60	        pressureHpa: session.weatherPressureHpa,
    61	        humidityPercent: session.weatherHumidityPercent,
    62	        windSpeedMs: session.weatherWindSpeedMs,
    63	        windDirectionDegrees: session.weatherWindDirectionDegrees,
    64	        fetchedAt: session.weatherFetchedAt,
    65	      ),
    66	    ];
    67	  }
    68	
    69	  Widget _fishermanSummary(List<WeatherSnapshot> snapshots) {
    70	    final events = session.grid.where((entry) => entry['type'] != 0).toList();
    71	    if (events.isEmpty) {
    72	      return const Text(
    73	        'No activity events recorded for match insight.',
    74	        style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12),
    75	      );
    76	    }
    77	    int interval(Map<String, dynamic> entry) =>
    78	        int.tryParse(entry['interval']?.toString() ?? '') ?? 0;
    79	    final active = [...events]..sort((a, b) => interval(a).compareTo(interval(b)));
    80	    final quiet = [...events]..sort((a, b) => interval(b).compareTo(interval(a)));
    81	    final best = active.first;
    82	    final slow = quiet.first;
    83	    final weather = snapshots.isEmpty ? '' : ' Weather samples available across the match.';
    84	    return Text(
    85	      'Match insight: highest activity near ${best['timestamp'] ?? '--:--'} after ${interval(best)}s. '
    86	      'Quietest gap before ${slow['timestamp'] ?? '--:--'} was ${interval(slow)}s.$weather',
    87	      style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12, height: 1.35),
    88	    );
    89	  }
    90	
    91	  Widget _trend(List<WeatherSnapshot> snapshots) {
    92	    final first = snapshots.first;
    93	    final last = snapshots.last;
    94	    final parts = <String>[];
    95	    final temp = _delta(first.temperatureCelsius, last.temperatureCelsius, 'temp');
    96	    if (temp.isNotEmpty) parts.add(temp);
    97	    final pressure = _delta(first.pressureHpa, last.pressureHpa, 'pressure');
    98	    if (pressure.isNotEmpty) parts.add(pressure);
    99	    final winds = snapshots
   100	        .map((s) => s.windSpeedMs)
   101	        .whereType<double>()
   102	        .toList();
   103	    if (winds.isNotEmpty) {
   104	      winds.sort();
   105	      parts.add('max wind ${winds.last.toStringAsFixed(1)} m/s');
   106	    }
   107	    if (parts.isEmpty) return const SizedBox.shrink();
   108	    return Text(
   109	      parts.join(' • '),
   110	      style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 12),
   111	    );
   112	  }
   113	
   114	  String _delta(double? from, double? to, String label) {
   115	    if (from == null || to == null) return '';
   116	    final diff = to - from;
   117	    if (diff.abs() < 0.1) return '$label stable';
   118	    final arrow = diff > 0 ? 'up' : 'down';
   119	    return '$label $arrow ${diff.abs().toStringAsFixed(1)}';
   120	  }
   121	
   122	  Widget _snapshotCard(WeatherSnapshot snapshot) {
   123	    final rows = <String>[
   124	      if (snapshot.fetchedAt.isNotEmpty) snapshot.fetchedAt,
   125	      if (snapshot.description.isNotEmpty) snapshot.description,
   126	      if (snapshot.temperatureCelsius != null)
   127	        '${l10n.temperatureLabel}: ${snapshot.temperatureCelsius!.toStringAsFixed(1)}°C',
   128	      if (snapshot.pressureHpa != null)
   129	        '${l10n.pressureLabel}: ${snapshot.pressureHpa!.toStringAsFixed(0)} hPa',
   130	      if (snapshot.humidityPercent != null)
   131	        '${l10n.humidityLabel}: ${snapshot.humidityPercent!.toStringAsFixed(0)}%',
   132	      if (snapshot.windSpeedMs != null)
   133	        '${l10n.windSpeedLabel}: ${snapshot.windSpeedMs!.toStringAsFixed(1)} m/s',
   134	      if (snapshot.windDirectionDegrees != null)
   135	        '${l10n.windDirectionLabel}: ${snapshot.windDirectionDegrees!.toStringAsFixed(0)}°',
   136	    ];
   137	
   138	    return Container(
   139	      width: double.infinity,
   140	      margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
   141	      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
   142	      decoration: BoxDecoration(
   143	        color: Colors.white10,
   144	        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
   145	      ),
   146	      child: Text(
   147	        rows.join('\n'),
   148	        style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, height: 1.35),
   149	      ),
   150	    );
   151	  }

I’m thinking about how to handle missing intervals or null values, which should default to zero. It’s crucial that partial timestamps degrade gracefully instead of causing crashes, but they could still be misleading. Should I include a note about this? Maybe it’s optional and not a blocker. I’m also pondering a potential crash in the WeatherDuringMatchSection if the `_snapshotCard` rows are empty. In that case, it should just display empty text instead of crashing."},{"type":"summary_text","text":"**Reviewing weather snapshots**

I need to ensure that weather snapshots align with the match time window. Right now, the implementation doesn’t filter these snapshots effectively, which might be a blocker if sessions only contain match snapshots. The plan states to use non-empty weatherSnapshots, so I’ll verify the section’s correctness. 

Also, there’s a potential bug in the AnalyticsScreenBody wiring. Currently, it renders weather for both the athlete and coach, but existing sections are only for the coach. It’s essential to double-check that testing verifies CSV results accurately."},{"type":"summary_text","text":"**Identifying potential blockers**

I’m noticing a potential blocker with the finalCount being null, which serializes to null and leads to issues when reloading sessions. This results in a finalCount of 0 being displayed in the UI or export. The requirements state that fields should be optional for sessions without results, but if we save sessions with no count, it won't preserve null values. 

I should also consider if an invalid finalCount is passed as a JSON empty string, which might lead to unintended results. Testing needs improvement too, as weight-only tests don't cover count, affecting backward compatibility with GameSession data."},{"type":"summary_text","text":"**Considering testing options**

I’m thinking about testing with Flutter. It seems like using `flutter test` isn’t straightforward here. I wonder if I could run Dart directly, possibly with a script that imports the package. However, I'm not sure if the Dart CLI can read from stdin. Maybe creating a temporary file outside the environment is an option, but I can't edit it.

I could try using `dart run`, but it might not be necessary. Acceptance commands can include things like `git diff`, `nl`, and `grep`, but not tests."},{"type":"summary_text","text":"**Analyzing git commands**

I’m thinking about validating the analysis or test commands, and I feel like I need to include read commands along with their results for structure. It seems I should inspect `git diff --name-only` for changed files, but should that include untracked ones? I intend to list current changed files and include acceptance criteria for relevant diffs. I'll also consider how to handle the artifacts. It might be best not to include certain files or mention the "staged" status. I need to verify staged status to clarify things."}]}

## Review

- Correct:
  - `AnalyticsScreenBody` wires existing `AnalyticsTimelineSection` and new `WeatherDuringMatchSection` before charts: `lib/widgets/analytics_screen_body.dart:60-62`.
  - Weather widget has empty-data fallback and avoids `first/last` on empty lists: `lib/widgets/weather_during_match_section.dart:29-37`, `91-107`.
  - Result values display in analytics/history/export when non-null: `lib/widgets/analytics_dashboard_section.dart:91-100`, `lib/widgets/history_session_details.dart:40-43`, `lib/services/report_exporter.dart:30-33`, `179-183`.
  - `SessionEditDialog` initializes, saves, and clears result inputs through controllers/copyWith flags: `lib/widgets/session_edit_dialog.dart:74-79`, `121-124`.

- Blocker:
  - `lib/game_session.dart:302-329` — `finalCount` does not preserve optional/null values through JSON. `toJson()` always writes `"finalCount": null`; `fromJson()` checks only `containsKey` and then calls `TypeUtils.safeInt(null)`, which returns `0` (`lib/utils/type_utils.dart:12-16`). Result: weight-only or unknown-count sessions reload as `finalCount == 0`, causing UI/export to show a fake count. Tests miss this because weight-only round-trip asserts only weight: `test/game_session_test.dart:150`.

- Fix worth doing now:
  - Add assertions for `finalCount` remaining null on weight-only/no-result JSON round-trip, and for CSV result rows. Current CSV exporter code includes rows, but `test/report_exporter_test.dart:83-90` does not assert them.
  - Add the missing `SessionEditDialog` widget test noted in project tasks; current tests cover model/export/timeline/weather, not edit save/clear.

- Optional/defer:
  - Weather tests do not cover session-level weather fallback; current code path exists at `lib/widgets/weather_during_match_section.dart:44-66`.
  - Weather snapshots are not filtered to a match window; likely acceptable v1 because existing capture appears session-scoped, but requirement wording asks “fall inside match time window.”
